info.title: Solana Developer Platform API
info.description: Production-only OpenAPI spec generated from API schemas and routes. API versioning is path-based: /v1 is the current contract, and breaking changes are introduced under a new path major (for example /v2). The OpenAPI info.version tracks spec/document revision for the current path contract.

tags.name: Wallets
tags.description: Wallet signing provider configuration and wallet management.

tags.name: Issuance
tags.description: Token issuance, allowlists, and lifecycle operations.

apiKeyAuth.description: Use Authorization: Bearer sk_test_... or sk_live_... with a base64url-encoded suffix.

adminKey.name: X-Admin-Key
adminKey.description: Admin key for internal allowlist management.

organizationRegistrationToken.name: x-organization-registration-token
organizationRegistrationToken.description: Pre-shared token required for organization self-registration.

get.description: Returns service health and build metadata.
Performs readiness checks for downstream dependencies.

post.description: Creates an organization and returns an API key summary. Requires x-organization-registration-token. Set returnFullApiKey to true to return the full key once.

slug.description: Optional URL-friendly slug. Generated from name if omitted.

returnFullApiKey.description: Whether to return the full API key. Defaults to false.

custody.description: Optional custody configuration to provision a signing wallet for the organization.

allowedIpAddresses.description: Allowed IP addresses for API access.

key.description: Full API key. Only returned once.

apiKey.description: Initial API key for the organization.

get.description: Returns organization details for the authenticated organization.

allowedIpAddresses.description: Allowed IP addresses for API access.
Allowed IP addresses for API access.

delete.description: Soft deletes the organization and revokes all API keys.

get.description: Lists API keys for the authenticated organization.

lastUsedAt.description: Timestamp of the last key usage.

post.description: Creates a new API key. The full key is returned once.

name.description: Friendly name for the API key.

role.description: Role assigned to this API key.

permissions.description: Optional explicit permission set. Requires owner-level access.

allowedIps.description: Optional list of CIDR ranges allowed to use the key.

signingWalletId.description: Optional existing custody wallet ID to bind this key to.

provisionWallet.description: If true, provisions a new custody wallet and binds it to the key.

walletLabel.description: Optional label for a provisioned wallet.

walletPurpose.description: Optional purpose for a provisioned wallet.

key.description: Full API key. Only returned once.

get.description: Gets API key details by id.

items.description: Permission granted to the API key.

permissions.description: Custom permissions override. Null means role defaults.

allowedIps.description: CIDR ranges permitted to use the key.

signingWalletId.description: Optional custody wallet bound to this API key for signing.

lastUsedAt.description: Timestamp of the last key usage.

rotationDeadline.description: Deadline before the previous key is revoked.

patch.description: Updates API key attributes. Use null to clear optional fields.

description.description: Updated description. Use null to clear.

allowedIps.description: Updated IP allowlist. Use null to clear.

expiresAt.description: Updated expiration. Use null to clear.

permissions.description: Updated explicit permission set. Use null to revert to role defaults.

signingWalletId.description: Updated signing wallet binding. Use null to clear.

delete.description: Deactivates (soft deletes) an API key and invalidates it immediately.

confirmation.description: Type the exact API key name to confirm deletion.

post.description: Rotates an API key and returns the new key plus the old key grace period.

gracePeriodHours.description: Grace period for the old key before revocation.

key.description: Full API key. Only returned once.

rotationDeadline.description: Deadline for revoking the previous key.

get.description: Lists members of the authenticated organization.

post.description: Creates an invitation for a new organization member.

role.description: Role assigned to the invited member.

post.description: Accepts an invitation token and activates membership.

name.description: Optional name to set for the user.

delete.description: Removes a member from the organization.

post.description: Revokes the current session and clears the session cookie.

get.description: Returns the current session user, organization, and permissions.

lastLoginAt.description: Timestamp of the last login, if available.

get.description: Lists active sessions for the current user.

authMethod.description: Authentication method used by the session.

current.description: Whether this is the current session.

delete.description: Revokes an active session by id.

post.description: Initializes wallet signing for the organization or project by creating an active signing configuration.

schema.description: Initialize wallet signing provider for the organization or project.

publicKey.description: Public key of the provisioned root wallet.

walletId.description: Provider wallet ID of the provisioned root wallet.

post.description: Switches the active wallet signing provider for the organization or project without rotating existing on-chain authorities.

schema.description: Switch the active wallet signing provider for the organization or project.

publicKey.description: Public key of the provisioned root wallet.

walletId.description: Provider wallet ID of the provisioned root wallet.

post.description: Provisions a new wallet for the active signing provider configuration.

label.description: Optional label for the new wallet.

purpose.description: Optional semantic purpose for the wallet.

setDefault.description: Set this wallet as the default signer for the active wallet signing config.

get.description: Lists wallets for the active signing configuration.

post.description: Sets the default wallet for the active signing configuration.

walletId.description: Wallet ID to set as default for the active wallet signing config.

get.description: Returns the active wallet signing configuration for the organization or project.

organizationId.description: Organization ID that owns this wallet signing config.

projectId.description: Optional project scope for this config.

publicKey.description: Public key associated with the current default wallet.

get.description: Returns the active wallet public key for transaction construction.

post.description: Creates a project within the organization.

rpcEndpoint.description: Custom Solana RPC endpoint for the project.

get.description: Lists projects in the organization.

rpcEndpoint.description: Custom Solana RPC endpoint for the project.

get.description: Gets project details.

rpcEndpoint.description: Custom Solana RPC endpoint for the project.

description.description: Updated description. Use null to clear.

settings.description: Updated project settings. Use null to clear.

rpcEndpoint.description: Custom Solana RPC endpoint for the project.

delete.description: Archives a project and prevents future writes.

get.description: Lists members assigned to the project.

user.description: User details for the project member.

items.description: Project member record with user details.

post.description: Adds an organization member to the project.

userId.description: User identifier to add to the project.

user.description: User details for the project member.

delete.description: Removes a member from the project.

get.description: Lists API keys scoped to the project.

lastUsedAt.description: Timestamp of the last key usage.

post.description: Creates an API key scoped to the project. The full key is returned once.

name.description: Friendly name for the API key.

role.description: Role assigned to this API key.

permissions.description: Optional explicit permission set. Requires owner-level access.

allowedIps.description: Optional list of CIDR ranges allowed to use the key.

signingWalletId.description: Optional existing custody wallet ID to bind this key to.

provisionWallet.description: If true, provisions a new custody wallet and binds it to the key.

walletLabel.description: Optional label for a provisioned wallet.

walletPurpose.description: Optional purpose for a provisioned wallet.

key.description: Full API key. Only returned once.

get.description: Returns all available token templates with their default configuration and supported extensions.

description.example: USD-backed stablecoins with compliance controls and privacy features

maxDecimals.description: Maximum allowed decimals for this template.

requiresAllowlist.description: Whether allowlists are required for this template by default.

allowlistOverridable.description: Whether allowlist enforcement can be disabled by request.

requiredExtensions.description: Required Token-2022 extensions for this template.

availableExtensions.description: Extensions that can be configured for this template.

defaultExtensions.description: Default extension values used by this template.

get.description: Returns details for a specific token template including default decimals, required extensions, and available overrides.

description.example: USD-backed stablecoins with compliance controls and privacy features

maxDecimals.description: Maximum allowed decimals for this template.

requiresAllowlist.description: Whether allowlists are required for this template by default.

allowlistOverridable.description: Whether allowlist enforcement can be disabled by request.

requiredExtensions.description: Required Token-2022 extensions for this template.

availableExtensions.description: Extensions that can be configured for this template.

defaultExtensions.description: Default extension values used by this template.

post.description: Creates a token record that can later be deployed to Solana.

uri.description: Metadata URI passed to on-chain token metadata (points to off-chain JSON).

maxSupply.description: Maximum supply as a string (UI units).

template.description: Token template preset. Defaults to 'custom' if not specified.

transferFeeConfigAuthority.description: Authority to configure transfer fees. Defaults to platform authority.

withdrawWithheldAuthority.description: Authority to withdraw withheld fees. Defaults to platform authority.

transferFee.description: Transfer fee configuration or false to disable.

rateAuthority.description: Authority that can update the rate. Defaults to platform authority.

interestBearing.description: Interest-bearing configuration or false to disable.

permanentDelegate.description: Permanent delegate authority address, or false to disable.

authority.description: Authority that can pause/resume transfers. Defaults to platform authority.

pausable.description: Pausable configuration or false to disable.

authority.description: Authority that can update scaled UI parameters. Defaults to platform authority.

newMultiplierEffectiveTimestamp.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the new multiplier takes effect.

scaledUiAmount.description: Scaled UI amount configuration or false to disable.

authority.description: Authority that can update the hook program. Defaults to platform authority.

transferHook.description: Transfer hook configuration or false to disable.

totalSupply.description: Cached total supply in UI units (stored to avoid frequent RPC reads). Use POST /v1/issuance/tokens/{tokenId}/supply/refresh to force an on-chain refresh.

totalSupplyUpdatedAt.description: Timestamp when supply was last refreshed.

maxSupply.description: Maximum supply in UI units, if capped.

createdBy.description: Actor identifier that created the token.

post.description: Freezes a token account to prevent transfers.

schema.description: Idempotency key for safely retrying mutating requests.

accountAddress.description: Token account or owner address to freeze.
Token account or owner address that is frozen.

frozenAt.description: Timestamp when the account was frozen.

frozenBy.description: Actor identifier that froze the account.

unfrozenAt.description: Timestamp when the account was unfrozen, if applicable.

unfrozenBy.description: Actor identifier that unfroze the account.

signature.description: Solana transaction signature for the latest freeze/unfreeze.

post.description: Unfreezes a token account so it can be used again.
